title: Library Migration Patterns Database
description: Curated migration patterns for common library upgrades

breaking_changes.reason: React 18 uses concurrent rendering with createRoot API
Hydration now uses hydrateRoot for SSR apps
Unmounting is now a method on the root instance

new_features.name: Automatic Batching
new_features.description: React 18 automatically batches updates in setTimeout, promises, and native event handlers
new_features.migration: No code changes required - automatic performance improvement
new_features.opt_out: Use ReactDOM.flushSync() to opt-out of automatic batching

new_features.name: Suspense for SSR
new_features.description: Server-side rendering now supports Suspense boundaries

breaking_changes.reason: Next.js 13 introduces App Router with server components

breaking_changes.replacement: async function getData() { ... } // in Server Component
breaking_changes.reason: Server Components replace data fetching methods
Image component API changed in Next.js 13

new_features.name: Server Components
new_features.description: React Server Components enabled by default in app directory
new_features.migration: Use 'use client' directive for client-only components

breaking_changes.reason: React Query v4 uses object-based configuration
breaking_changes.example_after: const { data } = useQuery({ queryKey: ['users'], queryFn: fetchUsers, staleTime: 5000 });

breaking_changes.replacement: new QueryClient({ defaultOptions: { queries: { refetchOnWindowFocus: false } } })

new_features.name: Improved TypeScript support
new_features.description: Better type inference for query keys and data
new_features.migration: Update TypeScript to 4.1+ for best experience

breaking_changes.reason: Vue 3 uses createApp for better tree-shaking
breaking_changes.example_before:
import Vue from 'vue';
new Vue({ render: h => h(App) }).$mount('#app');

breaking_changes.reason: v-model prop/event names changed for consistency

new_features.name: Composition API
new_features.description: New composition-based API for better code organization
new_features.migration: Gradually migrate from Options API using setup()

breaking_changes.reason: More accurate DOM types may cause new errors
breaking_changes.example_before: // May have allowed incorrect DOM usage
breaking_changes.example_after: // Stricter type checking on DOM APIs

new_features.name: Decorators Stage 3
new_features.migration: Update decorator usage to new syntax
